## Page 73

### [p073_c0001] All Agency Policy Directive
### [p073_c0002] TITLE VI AND RELATED NONDISCRIMINATION LAWS COMPLAINT MANAGEMENT
[p073_c0003]

```text
Policy Number Responsible Department Effective Date Page 11-074 Department of Diversity & Civil Rights May 20, 2020 Page 1 of 11
```
### [p073_c0004] 1. PURPOSE AND OBJECTIVE
[p073_c0005] 1.1 The purpose of this Policy Directive is to establish a process for managing and resolving complaints of discrimination under Title VI and related nondiscrimination laws, brought by any individual or group of individuals who believe they were subjected to discrimination on the basis of race, color, national origin (including limited English proficiency (LEP) access), age, sex, religion, and disability in connection with any federally-funded program or activity of the Metropolitan Transportation Authority (“MTA”) and the following affiliated and subsidiary agencies: MTA Long Island Rail Road, MTA Metro-North Railroad, MTA Construction & Development, MTA Bus Company, and MTA New York City Transit, including the Manhattan and Bronx Surface Transit Operating Authority and the Staten Island Rapid Transit Operating Authority, (collectively, the “MTA Agencies”). 1
### [p073_c0006] 2. SCOPE
[p073_c0007] 2.1 This Policy Directive is in accordance with Title VI of the Civil Rights Act of 1964, 42 U.S.C. § 2000d et seq., the Federal Transit Laws, (49 U.S.C. § 5332), and the guidance of FTA Title VI Circular 4702.1B, FTA Environmental Justice Policy Guidance for Federal Transit Administration Recipients 4703.1, and FTA EEO Circular 4704.1A.
[p073_c0008] 2.2 This Policy Directive does not apply to complaints of employment discrimination, harassment or retaliation under the MTA Agencies, Equal Employment Opportunity and related policies. Such complaints are managed and resolved by the Internal Discrimination Complaint Management Policy Directive, No. 11-062.
### [p073_c0009] 3. DEFINITIONS
[p073_c0010] 3.1 Administrative Closure – A complaint that is closed without the MTA Agency issuing an investigatory determination. The reasons for an Administrative Closure may include, but are not limited to: (1) A Complainant fails to pursue the complaint, which includes
[p073_c0011] _1 The MTA Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority is not subject to this Policy Directive due to its funding status._
[p073_c0012] _Issued: Chairman and Chief Executive Officer_
[p073_c0013] _MTA Corporate Compliance_
[p073_c0014] _Master Page # 73 of 1629 - Diversity Committee Meeting 3/23/2026_

## Page 74

### [p074_c0001] All Agency Policy Directive
### [p074_c0002] TITLE VI AND RELATED NONDISCRIMINATION LAWS COMPLAINT MANAGEMENT
[p074_c0003]

```text
Policy Number Responsible Department Effective Date Page 11-074 Department of Diversity & Civil Rights May 20, 2020 Page 2 of 11
```
[p074_c0004] (a) his/her failure to respond to a request for information needed to determine the acceptability of the complaint and/or (b) his/her failure to cooperate with the investigation; (2) The Complainant did not provide enough information to investigate the complaint. (3) The Complainant has filed or files the same complaint with a court or administrative agency.
- [p074_c0005] 3.2 Complainant - An individual or group of individuals alleging discrimination on the grounds of race, color, national origin (including LEP access), age, sex, religion and disability in connection with any federally-funded program or activity, including the services and other transit-related programs provided by the MTA Agencies. 3.3 Customer Service – Any Department, Division or Sub-division designated by the MTA Agencies to receive verbal or written complaints by customers, whether centralized or specific to such Department, Division, or Sub-division. 3.4 Designation of Representative Form – A form used by an individual or group to designate an authorized representative to assist them in making their complaint. An authorized representative may be a friend, family member, relative, or other person or organization of an individual's choosing. 3.5 Discrimination - Any action or inaction in any federally-funded program or activity of an MTA Agency, contractor or subcontractor that results in disparate treatment, disparate impact, or that perpetuates the effects of such, based on race, color, national origin (including LEP access), age, sex, religion or disability. 3.6 Investigation – A formal inquiry into the allegations of a complaint for the purpose of determining whether there has been a violation of policy as stated in MTA's Title VI and Related Nondiscrimination Laws Policy Statement. 3.7 Letter of Finding – Letters of Finding (s) are issued as the result of the investigation and determination of a complaint received by the responding MTA Agency and sets forth the conclusion as to Reasonable Cause, No Reasonable Cause or Administratively Closed finding.
[p074_c0006] _Issued: Chairman and Chief Executive Officer MTA Corporate Compliance_
[p074_c0007] _Master Page # 74 of 1629 - Diversity Committee Meeting 3/23/2026_

## Page 75

### [p075_c0001] All Agency Policy Directive
### [p075_c0002] TITLE VI AND RELATED NONDISCRIMINATION LAWS COMPLAINT MANAGEMENT
[p075_c0003]

```text
Policy Number Responsible Department Effective Date Page 11-074 Department of Diversity & Civil Rights May 20, 2020 Page 3 of 11
```
- [p075_c0004] 3.8 No Reasonable Cause - An investigation determination that a Complainant's allegations are unsubstantiated. 3.9 Reasonable Cause - An investigation determination that a Complainant's allegations are substantiated. 3.10 Respondent - The MTA Agency or Agency's employee(s) that an alleged Title VI or other discrimination complaint has been filed against. 3.11 Complaint - Any verbal or written communication received by an MTA Agency from an individual, group of individuals or organization(s), alleging discriminatory treatment in any federally-funded activity or program of an MTA Agency on the grounds of race, color, national origin (including LEP access), age, sex, religion or disability. 3.12 Withdrawal – After a complaint has been submitted, the Complainant requests that the complaint investigation be closed prior to completion.
### [p075_c0005] 4. RESPONSIBILITIES
- [p075_c0006] 4.1 Every MTA employee is responsible for compliance with the policy as stated in MTA's Title VI and Related Nondiscrimination Laws Policy Statement, which provides that no person shall be excluded from participation in, denied the benefits of, or be subjected to discrimination in, any federally-funded program or activity including the services and other transit-related programs provided by the MTA Agencies, on the grounds of race, color, national origin (including LEP access), age, sex, religion or disability. 4.2 Each MTA Agency's Diversity/EO Office shall be responsible for receiving, acknowledging, reviewing, investigating, tracking, reporting, referring to other designated departments, and when applicable, making recommendations for appropriate action, for all Complaints, with the exception of Complaints handled by an MTA Agency's Law Department (see 4.5 below). 4.3 Each MTA Agency's Diversity/EO Office shall also be responsible for developing and implementing a training program for managers and supervisors of the customer
[p075_c0007] _Issued: Chairman and Chief Executive Officer_
[p075_c0008] _MTA Corporate Compliance_
[p075_c0009] _Master Page # 75 of 1629 - Diversity Committee Meeting 3/23/2026_

## Page 76

### [p076_c0001] All Agency Policy Directive
### [p076_c0002] TITLE VI AND RELATED NONDISCRIMINATION LAWS COMPLAINT MANAGEMENT
[p076_c0003]

```text
Policy Number Responsible Department Effective Date Page 11-074 Department of Diversity & Civil Rights May 20, 2020 Page 4 of 11
```
[p076_c0004] complaint process and front-line employees with direct customer interaction, on how to identify potential complaints of Title VI or other discrimination.
### [p076_c0005] 4.4 Customer Service Department/Division/Sub-division at each MTA Agency
- [p076_c0006] 4.4.1 Each agency shall keep a record of all customer complaints of potential Title VI and other forms of discrimination as identified herein. 4.4.2 Prior to the investigation, the individual receiving the complaint should follow the process below: 4.4.2.1 Identify whether the Complainant (s) allegation is a potential violation of Title VI or whether other discrimination is alleged. 4.4.2.2 Enter the complaint into a tracking system, assign a unique identifier number to the complaint, and indicate whether the complaint alleges a potential Title VI violation or whether other discrimination is alleged. 4.4.2.3 Route the complaint electronically to the appropriate MTA Agency's Diversity/EOO office within 3 business days of receipt. 4.4.2.4 Acknowledge receipt of the customer's complaint by letter or email and advise the customer of the following: 1. The complaint has been forwarded to the Diversity/EOO office where a determination will be made regarding whether the complaint constitutes a potential Title VI violation or whether other discrimination is alleged; 2. A Diversity/EOO Office or departmental investigator will contact the customer directly if more information is needed in order to conduct an investigation; 4.4.3 Within seven (7) business days after the complaint has been provided to the appropriate MTA Agency's Diversity/EOO Office, that office will provide notice back to the MTA Agency personnel receiving the complaint whether or not the complaint is accepted by their office, or referred back to customer service for appropriate referral to another department.
[p076_c0007] Issued: Chairman and Chief Executive Officer
[p076_c0008] MTA Corporate Compliance
[p076_c0009] _Master Page # 76 of 1629 - Diversity Committee Meeting 3/23/2026_

## Page 77

### [p077_c0001] All Agency Policy Directive
### [p077_c0002] TITLE VI AND RELATED NONDISCRIMINATION LAWS COMPLAINT MANAGEMENT
[p077_c0003]

```text
Policy Number Responsible Department Effective Date Page 11-074 Department of Diversity & Civil Rights May 20, 2020 Page 5 of 11
```
- [p077_c0004] 4.4.4 Any complaints determined by the Diversity/EEO Office investigator not to constitute a discrimination matter subject to this Policy Directive shall be handled in accordance with the relevant MTA Agency's standard processes for handling customer complaints. 4.4.5 Where a complaint is filed against an employee of a vendor or contractor with whom an MTA Agency has a direct contractual relationship, such complaint will be investigated by such vendor or contractor in accordance with the applicable contract. The MTA Agency will keep a record of such complaint and the outcome of such Complaint, and will ensure that the vendor has in place a Complaint procedure that comports with this Policy Directive.
### [p077_c0005] 4.5 MTA Agency's Law or Legal Department
- [p077_c0006] 4.5.1 Each MTA Agency law or legal department shall be responsible for handling all Complaints that have been filed with courts and administrative agencies or whenever deemed appropriate by the MTA Agency.
### [p077_c0007] 5. FILING A COMPLAINT
- [p077_c0008] 5.1 Under MTA's Title VI and Related Nondiscrimination Laws Policy Statement, any person who believes they have been subject to discrimination in any federally-funded program or activity, including the services and other transit-related programs provided by MTA Agencies, on the grounds of race, color, national origin (including LEP access), age, sex, religion or disability, may file a complaint. 5.2 A complaint under this Policy Directive must be made within 180 days of the alleged discrimination occurrence. A complaint is considered untimely if it is filed more than 180 days after the complaint event(s). A complaint shall be deemed filed on the date it is received by any Customer Service as defined in section 3.3. 5.3 A complaint may be made via phone, email, to customer service or by submitting a completed, dated and signed Title VI and Other Discrimination Complaint Form to an MTA Agency's Diversity/EEO Office. Any written complaint may be submitted, in person or by U.S. Mail, to the Diversity/EEO Office, by the Complainant or their representative. The Title VI and Other Discrimination Complaint Form can be downloaded from the MTA website at Filing a Title VI Complaint .
[p077_c0009] _Issued: Chairman and Chief Executive Officer_
[p077_c0010] _MTA Corporate Compliance_
[p077_c0011] _Master Page # 77 of 1629 - Diversity Committee Meeting 3/23/2026_

## Page 78

### [p078_c0001] All Agency Policy Directive
### [p078_c0002] TITLE VI AND RELATED NONDISCRIMINATION LAWS COMPLAINT MANAGEMENT
[p078_c0003]

```text
Policy Number Responsible Department Effective Date Page 11-074 Department of Diversity & Civil Rights May 20, 2020 Page 6 of 11
```
### [p078_c0004] 5.4 MTA Agency's Diversity/EOO Offices
[p078_c0005]

```text
MTA Headquarters Chief Diversity Officer Department of Diversity and Civil Rights 2 Broadway, 16 th Floor New York, NY 10004 1-800-466-8577 EEO Hotline (646) 252-1385 MTA Metro-North Railroad Director Office of Diversity and Equal Employment Opportunity 420 Lexington Avenue, 12 th Floor New York, NY 10170 (212) 340-3350, EEO Hotline MTA New York City Transit Vice President Department of EEO & Diversity 130 Livingston Street, 3 rd Floor Brooklyn, NY 11201 (718) 694-1730 MTA Long Island Rail Road Director Office of Diversity Management Jamaica Station, 4 th Floor Mail Code #1141 Jamaica, NY 11435 (718) 558-8170 MTA Bus Company Chief Equal Opportunity Officer Office of Equal Employment Opportunity 2 Broadway, 21 st Floor New York, NY 10004 (646) 252-8545 MTA Construction & Development Chief Equal Opportunity Officer Department of Diversity and Equal Opportunity 2 Broadway, 8 th Floor New York, NY 10004 Phone: (646) 252-4379
```
- [p078_c0006] 5.5 If a Complainant is physically unable to provide a written complaint, an MTA representative may transcribe a written record. A Complainant may also choose to have a third party representative file the complaint on their behalf. If a Complainant is represented by a third party, the Complainant may complete a Designation of Representative Form to notify the MTA Agency's Diversity/EOO Office.
[p078_c0007] Issued: Chairman and Chief Executive Officer
[p078_c0008] MTA Corporate Compliance
[p078_c0009] _Master Page # 78 of 1629 - Diversity Committee Meeting 3/23/2026_

## Page 79

### [p079_c0001] All Agency Policy Directive
### [p079_c0002] TITLE VI AND RELATED NONDISCRIMINATION LAWS COMPLAINT MANAGEMENT
[p079_c0003]

```text
Policy Number Responsible Department Effective Date Page 11-074 Department of Diversity & Civil Rights May 20, 2020 Page 7 of 11
```
- [p079_c0004] 5.6 If a complaint is made via telephone to the MTA Agency Diversity/EOO Office, the Complainant may be provided a Title VI and Other Discrimination Complaint Form via mail to complete. MTA Agencies will provide translation services in accordance with individual Language Assistance Programs. 5.7 A complaint should, to the best of a Complainant's ability, set forth: 5.7.1 The Complainant's name, address, telephone number or other method of communicating with them. If the complaint is filed on behalf of another person, it should include the Complainant's name, address, telephone number, and the relationship to the person filing the complaint (e.g., friend, attorney, parent, etc.). 5.7.2 The location, date and time of the alleged discrimination. 5.7.3 Names, addresses and telephone numbers of any witnesses that the MTA Agency could contact for relevant information to support or clarify the allegations. 5.7.4 A description of the alleged violation detailing how and why the Complainant believes they were discriminated against. The complaint should include as much background information as possible about the alleged act(s) of discrimination. 5.7.5 The names of any individual(s) against whom the complaint is filed or as much identifying information as possible.
### [p079_c0005] 6. COMPLAINT INVESTIGATION PROCESS
- [p079_c0006] 6.1 The Agency Diversity/EOO Office staff or designee will review and determine whether an allegation sufficiently alleges a violation as covered within this Policy Directive, is submitted timely, and is duplicative of a previous complaint filed by the same Complainant. 6.2 If the Agency Diversity/EOO Office staff or designee determines that a complaint does not allege a basis of discrimination as covered in this Policy Directive, is reported outside the 180 day requirement or a duplicative incident that has already been investigated, the Agency Diversity/EOO Office staff will notify the Complainant in writing within 15 business days, that the complaint would not be accepted for investigation and administratively close the complaint.
[p079_c0007] _Issued: Chairman and Chief Executive Officer_
[p079_c0008] _MTA Corporate Compliance_
[p079_c0009] _Master Page # 79 of 1629 - Diversity Committee Meeting 3/23/2026_

## Page 80

### [p080_c0001] All Agency Policy Directive
### [p080_c0002] TITLE VI AND RELATED NONDISCRIMINATION LAWS COMPLAINT MANAGEMENT
[p080_c0003]

```text
Policy Number Responsible Department Effective Date Page 11-074 Department of Diversity & Civil Rights May 20, 2020 Page 8 of 11
```
- [p080_c0004] 6.3 The MTA Agency Diversity/EEO Office staff or designee may ask a Complainant to clarify allegation(s) in writing or provide additional information necessary for its investigation. If the Complainant does not respond within the time requested, a complaint may be administratively closed. 6.4 Once an Agency Diversity/EEO Office staff or designee has determined that a complaint is timely, involves a covered basis of discrimination, and is non-duplicative, the investigator will assign the complaint a case number, send the Complainant acknowledgment that the complaint has been accepted for investigation and inform the Complainant, of the right to file directly with the Federal Transit Administration's Office of Civil Rights. 6.5 A prompt and thorough investigation will be launched in order to gather facts to determine whether the Respondent may have acted in violation of the policy as stated in MTA's Title VI And Related Nondiscrimination Laws Policy Statement, and to have sufficient factual data on which to base a finding. 6.6 The initial scope of the investigation is limited to the immediate issues raised by the Complainant, although it may be expanded to include other potential issues that are uncovered during the investigation. 6.7 The investigator will identify and interview relevant parties and witnesses, compile and analyze data, review relevant documents, make site visits if appropriate and prepare a written investigatory report on the investigation findings, and if applicable make recommendations. 6.8 The Diversity/EEO Office staff or designee will seek to complete its investigation within 120 business days from the date of the acceptance of the Complaint. If additional time is required to complete the investigation, the MTA Agency will send written notification to the Complainant. 6.9 Upon conclusion of the investigation, the investigator will prepare a summary of findings including a determination of reasonable cause/no reasonable cause. If there is a finding of reasonable cause, the investigator may recommend appropriate corrective action. Recommendations, if applicable for corrective action will be determined by the Agency Diversity/EEO Office staff or designee with input from its Legal or Law Department, and or, Labor Relations where appropriate, and administered in
[p080_c0005] _Issued: Chairman and Chief Executive Officer_
[p080_c0006] _MTA Corporate Compliance_
[p080_c0007] _Master Page # 80 of 1629 - Diversity Committee Meeting 3/23/2026_

## Page 81

### [p081_c0001] All Agency Policy Directive
### [p081_c0002] TITLE VI AND RELATED NONDISCRIMINATION LAWS COMPLAINT MANAGEMENT
[p081_c0003]

```text
Policy Number Responsible Department Effective Date Page 11-074 Department of Diversity & Civil Rights May 20, 2020 Page 9 of 11
```
[p081_c0004] accordance with MTA’s agencies policies and any applicable collective bargaining agreement(s). Human Resources, Labor Relations (if necessary), and/or Ethics and Legal/Law Departments will assist MTA Agencies in the implementation of corrective actions where appropriate.
- [p081_c0005] 6.10 Letter of Finding and Complaint Resolution: Upon completion of an investigation, the conclusion and recommended corrective action, if any, is communicated to the Complainant. 6.11 The Agency Diversity/EO Office will retain a record of discussions and documents relating to the investigation in a confidential file.
### [p081_c0006] 7. WITHDRAWAL AND REJECTION OF COMPLAINTS
- [p081_c0007] 7.1 The Complainant may withdraw their complaint during any stage of the process. Although there is no prescribed format for withdrawal, the Agency Diversity/EO Office staff will ensure that the intent to withdraw is clearly expressed as evidenced by a statement with the Complainant’s signature. The statement should indicate reasons for withdrawal. The original withdrawal statement should be made a part of the complaint file. 7.2 In the event a Complainant withdraws a complaint, MTA Agencies retain the right to continue the investigation without the Complainant’s cooperation, to ensure compliance with the policy as stated in MTA’s Title VI And Related Nondiscrimination Laws Policy Statement. 7.3 The Agency Diversity/EO Office staff or designee has the authority to reject a complaint. Complaints that fail to meet the conditions set forth above in Section 6 shall be formally rejected in writing by sending a closure letter. Where only a part of the complaint is rejected, the remainder of the complaint will be processed.
### [p081_c0008] 8. RIGHT TO FILE WITH EXTERNAL AGENCIES
- [p081_c0009] 8.1 The Letter of Finding will constitute the final internal decision and formally communicate the official findings of the investigation. If applicable, in all correspondence with Complainants, Complainants will be informed of the right, at any
[p081_c0010] _Issued: Chairman and Chief Executive Officer MTA Corporate Compliance_
[p081_c0011] _Master Page # 81 of 1629 - Diversity Committee Meeting 3/23/2026_

## Page 82

### [p082_c0001] All Agency Policy Directive
### [p082_c0002] TITLE VI AND RELATED NONDISCRIMINATION LAWS COMPLAINT MANAGEMENT
[p082_c0003]

```text
Policy Number Responsible Department Effective Date Page 11-074 Department of Diversity & Civil Rights May 20, 2020 Page 10 of 11
```
[p082_c0004] time (within the external agencies statute of limitations) to file a complaint with external agencies.
[p082_c0005] A Complainant may file a complaint against any MTA Agency subject to this Policy Directive alleging discrimination with:
[p082_c0006] Federal Transit Administration, Office of Civil Rights, Attention: Complaint Team, East Building 5 th Floor - TCR 1200 New Jersey Avenue, SE Washington, DC 20590
### [p082_c0007] 9. FREEDOM FROM REPRISAL
[p082_c0008] 9.1 It is a violation of this Policy Directive to: (1) retaliate against any person because they have filed a complaint under this Policy Directive or participated in an investigation under this Policy Directive; (2) interfere with any person's ability to file a complaint or participate in an investigation under this Policy Directive; or (3) impede or interfere with an investigation conducted by an MTA Agency under this Policy Directive.
### [p082_c0009] 10. TRACKING AND REPORTING
[p082_c0010] 10.1 Complaints filed pursuant to MTA's Title VI And Related Nondiscrimination Laws Policy Statement (both written and verbal), investigations, and lawsuits will be reported and tracked within each of the MTA Agencies, from the receipt of the complaint to the final disposition. The Department of Diversity and Civil Rights shall monitor the implementation of the MTA Agencies' Title VI and Related Nondiscrimination Laws Complaint Management procedures by reviewing each Agency's annual Title VI Program and periodic review of Title VI and Related Nondiscrimination Laws complaint files. MTA Agencies shall maintain investigation files of complaints under this Policy Directive for ten (10) years from the date of resolution of a complaint. However, records pertaining to an active or resolved lawsuit will be maintained according to MTA's Record Retention Policy and any application litigation hold instructions.
[p082_c0011] _Issued: Chairman and Chief Executive Officer MTA Corporate Compliance_
[p082_c0012] _Master Page # 82 of 1629 - Diversity Committee Meeting 3/23/2026_

## Page 85

### [p085_c0001] Title VI and Related Nondiscrimination Laws Complaint Management Form
[p085_c0002] MTA and its subsidiary and affiliate agencies are committed to providing non-discriminatory service to ensure that no person is excluded from participation in, denied the benefits of, or subjected to discrimination in the receipt of any of the MTA's federally funded program or activity, including the services and other transit-related programs on the basis of race, color, national origin (including limited English proficiency (LEP) access), age, sex, religion, and/or disability.
[p085_c0003] If you feel that you have been discriminated against, please provide the necessary information below in order to facilitate the processing of your complaint. If assistance is required to complete this form, please refer to the last page to find contact phone numbers and mailing addresses for assistance.
[p085_c0004] Your complaint must be filed within 180 days of the alleged discrimination. Failure to file a complaint within 180 days will result in the dismissal of your complaint. The exception is with regards to sexual harassment allegations, which can be filed up to three years after the alleged occurrence, which is consistent with New York State law.
[p085_c0005] Please select the MTA Agency you wish to file this complaint against: MTA Bus MTA Construction and Development MTA Headquarters Long Island Rail Road Metro-North Railroad New York City Transit
### [p085_c0006] Official Use Only
[p085_c0007] Complaint No: _____ Investigator(s) Name: _____
### [p085_c0008] 1. Complainant: (A complainant is the individual or group of individuals alleging discrimination)
[p085_c0009] Complainant's Name: _____
[p085_c0010] Address: _____
[p085_c0011] City: _____ State: _____ Zip Code: _____
[p085_c0012] Telephone # (Primary): _____ (Secondary) _____
[p085_c0013] E-mail: _____
[p085_c0014] Are you filing this complaint on behalf of yourself? Yes No If yes, go to #3.
### [p085_c0015] 2. Name of Person who suffered alleged discrimination or unfair treatment: (If other than Complainant.)
[p085_c0016] Name: _____
[p085_c0017] Address: _____
[p085_c0018] City: _____ State: _____ Zip Code: _____
[p085_c0019] Telephone # (Primary): _____ (Secondary) _____ Email: _____

[p085_c0021] What is the basis of your discrimination complaint? (Check all that apply.)
[p085_c0022] Race Color National Origin Age Sex Religion Disability Other _____
[p085_c0023] Incident Date (Month, Day, Year): _____ Incident Time: _____
[p085_c0024] Bus route/Bus number, Train line/ Train car number, or Subway Station: _____

However, please be advised that if you file a complaint with any court or administrative agency such as the United States Equal Employment Opportunity Commission (EEOC), the New York State Division of Human Rights (NYSDHR), or any other external forum, the MTA will administratively close your case and refer the matter to the Agency's Law Department for handling.

## Page 89

### [p089_c0001] Formulario de gestión de denuncias del Título VI y leyes de no discriminación relacionadas
[p089_c0002] MTA y sus agencias subsidiarias y afiliadas se comprometen a prestar un servicio no discriminatorio para garantizar que a ninguna persona se le excluya de la participación, se le nieguen los beneficios o se la discrimine en la recepción de cualquiera de los programas o las actividades de la MTA financiados con fondos federales, incluidos los servicios y otros programas relacionados con el transporte, por motivos de raza, color, nacionalidad de origen (incluido el acceso de personas con dominio limitado del inglés [LEP]), edad, sexo, religión o discapacidad.
[p089_c0003] Si considera que ha sido discriminado, proporcione la información necesaria a continuación para facilitar el procesamiento de su denuncia. Si necesita ayuda para completar este formulario, consulte la última página para encontrar los números de teléfono de contacto y las direcciones postales para recibir asistencia.
[p089_c0004] Debe presentar su denuncia dentro de los 180 días posteriores a la presunta discriminación. Si no la presenta dentro del plazo de 180 días, su denuncia se desestimará. Hay una excepción en el caso de las denuncias de acoso sexual, que se pueden presentar hasta tres años después del presunto incidente, lo que se ajusta a las leyes del estado de Nueva York.
[p089_c0005] Seleccione la agencia de la MTA contra la que desea presentar esta denuncia: MTA Bus MTA Construction and Development MTA Headquarters Long Island Rail Road Metro-North Railroad New York City Transit
### [p089_c0006] Official Use Only (Solo para uso oficial)
[p089_c0007] Complaint No: _____ Investigator(s) Name: _____
### [p089_c0008] 1. Denunciante: (un denunciante es el individuo o grupo de individuos que presentan una denuncia por discriminación)
[p089_c0009] Nombre del denunciante: _____
[p089_c0010] Dirección: _____
[p089_c0011] Ciudad: _____ Estado: _____ Código postal: _____
[p089_c0012] N.º de teléfono (principal): _____ (secundario) _____
[p089_c0013] Correo electrónico: _____
[p089_c0014] ¿Está presentando esta denuncia en su nombre? Si No Si la respuesta es sí, vaya al n.º 3.
### [p089_c0015] 2. Nombre de la persona que fue víctima de la presunta discriminación o el presunto trato injusto: (Si no es el denunciante)
[p089_c0016] Nombre: _____
[p089_c0017] Dirección: _____
[p089_c0018] Ciudad: _____ Estado: _____ Código postal: _____
[p089_c0019] N.º de teléfono (principal): _____ (secundario) _____ Correo electrónico: _____
### [p089_c0020] 3. Información de la denuncia:
[p089_c0021] ¿Cuál es la base de su denuncia por discriminación? (Marque todas las opciones que correspondan)
[p089_c0022] Raza Color Nacionalidad de origen Edad Sexo Religión Discapacidad Otro _____
[p089_c0023] Fecha del incidente (mes, día, año): _____ Hora del incidente: _____
[p089_c0024] Ruta de autobús/número de autobús, línea de tren/número de vagón o estación de subterráneo: _____

(Si necesita más espacio, adjunte hojas adicionales o utilice el reverso de este formulario). _____

[p090_c0004] Nombre: _____
[p090_c0005] N.º de teléfono (principal): _____ (secundario): _____
### [p090_c0006] 4. Historial de denuncias (si ha presentado esta denuncia en otra agencia, o si ha presentado denuncias antes).
[p090_c0007] ¿Ha presentado una denuncia por esta presunta discriminación ante otra agencia federal, estatal o local, o ante un tribunal federal o estatal? (Marque el espacio que corresponda) Sí No
[p090_c0008] Si su respuesta es afirmativa, marque la agencia que corresponda.
- [p090_c0009] Agencia federal Tribunal federal Agencia estatal Tribunal estatal Agencia local o municipal Otro

[p090_c0011] Fecha de presentación: _____
[p090_c0012] ¿Ha presentado alguna denuncia anterior ante una agencia de la MTA? (Marque el espacio que corresponda) Sí No Si su respuesta es afirmativa, proporcione la fecha, el nombre de la agencia y los números de la denuncia.
[p090_c0013] Si necesita adaptaciones especiales para comunicaciones futuras con respecto a esta denuncia, especifique qué formato alternativo necesita.
- [p090_c0014] Correo electrónico Braille Letra grande (especificar tamaño de fuente) Lenguaje de señas (especificar idioma) _____ Intérprete de idioma (especificar idioma) _____ Otro _____
[p090_c0015] Además de su derecho a presentar una denuncia ante la MTA, tiene derecho a presentar una denuncia del Título VI ante el Federal Transit Administration, Office of Civil Rights, Attention: Complaint Team, East Building 5 th Floor-TCR, 1200 New Jersey Avenue, SE, Washington, DC 20590. Sin embargo, tenga en cuenta que, si presenta una denuncia ante cualquier tribunal o agencia administrativa, como la Comisión de Igualdad de Oportunidades en el Empleo de los Estados Unidos (EEOC), la División de Derechos Humanos del Estado de Nueva York (NYSDHR) o cualquier otro foro externo, la MTA cerrará administrativamente su caso y remitirá el asunto al Departamento Jurídico de la Agencia para su tratamiento.
[p090_c0016] Por la presente afirmo que la información contenida en este documento es verdadera y correcta a mi leal saber y entender.
[p090_c0017] _____ Firma del denunciante
[p090_c0018] _____ Fecha

## Page 93

### [p093_c0001] Title VI 和相关非歧视法律投诉管理表
[p093_c0002] MTA 及其关联单位和附属机构致力于提供非歧视性服务，以确保所有人均不会被排除在 MTA 的任何联邦资助计划或活动之外，在所有服务和公共交通相关计划中不被剥夺任何权利，且不会因种族、肤色、原籍国（包括英语水平有限 (LEP)）、年龄、性别、宗教和/或残疾而遭受歧视。
[p093_c0003] 如果您认为自己受到了歧视，请提供下列必要信息，以便我们处理您的投诉。如需协助填写本表，请参阅最后一页以找到联络电话和邮寄地址。
[p093_c0004] 您的投诉必须在指控的歧视行为发生后 180 日内提交。未能在 180 日内提交投诉将导致投诉被撤销。涉及性骚扰的指控属于例外情形；根据纽约州相关法律，涉及性骚扰的指控的有效投诉期为三年。
[p093_c0005] 请选择您想要投诉的 MTA 机构： MTA Bus MTA Construction and Development MTA 总部
[p093_c0006] Long Island Rail Road Metro-North Railroad New York City Transit
### [p093_c0007] Official Use Only (仅限内部使用)
[p093_c0008] Complaint No: _____ Investigator(s) Name: _____

## Page 97

### [p097_c0001] Форма подачи жалобы по факту нарушения норм Title VI и применимых законов о запрете дискриминации
[p097_c0002] Муниципальное транспортное агентство (MTA), его и филиалы подразделения стремятся предоставлять недискриминационные услуги, гарантируя, что ни одному человеку не будет отказано в предоставлении таких услуг, получении выгоды от них, а также что ни один человек не будет подвержен дискриминации при получении обслуживания в рамках любой программы или инициативы, финансируемой на федеральном уровне, в том числе услуг в рамках других программ, имеющих отношение к транспорту, из-за его расы, цвета кожи или национальной принадлежности (в том числе в условиях ограниченного доступа к средствам повышения уровня владения английским языком (доступ к средствам LEP)), возраста, половой принадлежности, вероисповедания и/или наличия признаков инвалидности.
[p097_c0003] Если вы считаете, что стали жертвой дискриминации, предоставьте указанную ниже информацию, которая необходима для оперативной обработки вашей жалобы. Если вам необходима помощь при заполнении этой формы, перейдите на последнюю страницу, на которой приведена информация о контактных телефонных номерах и почтовых адресах для получения помощи.
[p097_c0004] Любые жалобы необходимо подать в течение 180 дней с даты происшествия, в рамках которого имела место предполагаемая дискриминация. Несоблюдение сроков подачи жалобы в течение 180 дней может стать причиной отказа в ее рассмотрении. Исключения составляют жалобы на сексуальные домогательства, которые, согласно законодательству штата Нью-Йорк, могут подаваться в течение трех лет с даты соответствующего происшествия.
[p097_c0005] Выберите организацию в структуре MTA, в отношении которой вы хотите подать жалобу: MTA Bus
[p097_c0006] MTA Construction and Development MTA Headquarters Long Island Rail Road Metro-North Railroad
[p097_c0007] New York City Transit
### [p097_c0008] Official Use Only (Для официального пользования)
[p097_c0009] Complaint No: _____ Investigator(s) Name: _____
### [p097_c0010] 1. Лицо, подавшее жалобу: (Лицо или группа лиц, сигнализирующих о предполагаемой дискриминации)

[p097_c0015] Электронная почта: _____

[p097_c0024] Расовая принадлежность Цвет кожи Национальное происхождение Возраст Половая принадлежность
[p097_c0025] Вероисповедание Признаки инвалидности Другое _____

## Page 99

[p099_c0001] В дополнение к вашему праву подать жалобу в MTA, вы имеете право подать жалобу согласно Разделу VI в организацию Federal Transit Administration, Office of Civil Rights, Attention: Complaint Team, East Building 5 th Floor-TCR, 1200 New Jersey Avenue, SE, Washington, DC 20590. Обращаем Ваше внимание на то, что, если вы подадите жалобу в любой суд или административное ведомство, к примеру в Комиссию по вопросам, связанным с равными возможностями трудоустройства США (United States Equal Employment Opportunity Commission, EEOC), Службу штата Нью-Йорк по вопросам прав человека (New York State Division of Human Rights, NYSDHR), либо в любой внешний судебный орган, агентство MTA в административном порядке закроет ваше дело и передаст его на рассмотрение в Юридический департамент агентства.
[p099_c0002] Настоящим подтверждаю, что информация, приведенная в этом документе, является достоверной и точной, насколько я могу судить, и насколько мне это известно.

[p099_c0004] _____ Дата

## Page 102

### [p102_c0001] শিরোনাম VI এবং সম্পর্কিত বৈষম্যহীনতা আইন অভিযোগ ব্যবস্থাপনা ফর্ম
[p102_c0002] জাতি, বর্ণ, জাতীয় উৎস (সীমিত ইংরেজি দক্ষতা (LEP) অ্যাক্সেস সহ), বয়স, লিঙ্গ, ধর্ম এবং/অথবা অক্ষমতার ভিত্তিতে কোনো ব্যক্তিকে পরিষেবা এবং অন্যান্য ট্রানজিট-সম্পর্কিত প্রোগ্রামগুলি সহ MTA-এর ফেডারেল অর্থায়নে পরিচালিত কোনো প্রোগ্রাম বা কার্যকলাপে অংশগ্রহণ থেকে বাদ দেওয়া, এর সুবিধাগুলি অস্বীকার করা বা বৈষম্যের শিকার করা যাতে না হয়, তা নিশ্চিত করার মাধ্যমে MTA এবং এর সম্পূরক ও সহযোগী সংস্থাগুলি বৈষম্যহীন পরিষেবা প্রদান করতে প্রতিশ্রুতিবদ্ধ।
[p102_c0003] আপনি যদি মনে করেন যে, আপনার সাথে বৈষম্য করা হয়েছে, তাহলে আপনার অভিযোগের প্রক্রিয়াকরণের সুবিধার্থে অনুগ্রহ করে নিচে প্রয়োজনীয় তথ্য প্রদান করুন। যদি এই ফর্মটি পূরণ করতে সহায়তার প্রয়োজন হয়, তাহলে সহায়তার জন্য যোগাযোগের ফোন নম্বর এবং চিঠি পাঠানোর ঠিকানা খুঁজে পেতে অনুগ্রহ করে শেষ পৃষ্ঠাটি দেখুন।
[p102_c0004] কথিত বৈষম্যের 180 দিনের মধ্যে আপনার অভিযোগ দায়ের করতে হবে। 180 দিনের মধ্যে অভিযোগ দায়ের করতে ব্যর্থ হলে আপনার অভিযোগ খারিজ হয়ে যাবে। ব্যতিক্রম হল যৌন হয়রানির অভিযোগের ক্ষেত্রে, যেটি অভিযুক্ত ঘটনার তিন বছর পর পর্যন্ত দায়ের করা হবে, যা New York স্টেটের আইনের সাথে সামঞ্জস্যপূর্ণ।
[p102_c0005] আপনি যে MTA এজেন্সির বিরুদ্ধে এই অভিযোগ দায়ের করতে চান, তা অনুগ্রহ করে নির্বাচন করুন: MTA বাস MTA নির্মাণ ও উন্নয়ন MTA হেডকোয়ার্টার লং আইল্যান্ড (Long Island) রেল রোড মেট্রো-নর্থ (Metro-North) রেলরোড New York সিটি ট্রানজিট
### [p102_c0006] Official Use Only (শুধুমাত্র সরকারি কাজে ব্যবহার করা যাবে)

### [p102_c0008] 1. অভিযোগকারী: (একজন অভিযোগকারী ব্যক্তি বা ব্যক্তিদের গোষ্ঠী, যারা বৈষম্যের অভিযোগ করেছে)

## Page 103

[p103_c0001] ঘটনার তারিখ (মাস, দিন, বছর): _____ ঘটনার সময়: _____
[p103_c0002] বাস রুট/বাস নম্বর, ট্রেন লাইন/ ট্রেন কার নম্বর বা সাবওয়ে স্টেশন:
[p103_c0003] অবস্থান: _____
[p103_c0004] কথিত ঘটনার বর্ণনা দিন। কী ঘটেছে, কারা জড়িত ছিল এবং আপনাকে যে ব্যক্তি(রা) আপনার প্রতি বৈষম্য করেছে বলে মনে করেন তাদের শনাক্তকারী তথ্য ব্যাখ্যা করুন। (যদি আরও স্থান প্রয়োজন হয়, তাহলে অতিরিক্ত পেপার শিট সংযুক্ত করুন বা এই ফর্মের পিছনের অংশ ব্যবহার করুন।) _____
[p103_c0005] অনুগ্রহ করে প্রাসঙ্গিক তথ্য সহ কোনো সাক্ষী বা ব্যক্তিদের যোগাযোগের তথ্য দিন। (যদি আরও স্থান প্রয়োজন হয়, তাহলে অতিরিক্ত পেপার শিট সংযুক্ত করুন বা এই ফর্মের পিছনের অংশ ব্যবহার করুন।)
[p103_c0006] নাম: _____
[p103_c0007] টেলিফোন # (মুখ্য): _____ (বিকল্প:) _____
### [p103_c0008] 4. অভিযোগের অতীত বিবরণ (যদি আপনি অন্য এজেন্সির কাছে এই অভিযোগটি দায়ের করেন, বা পূর্ববর্তী অভিযোগ দায়ের করেন।)
[p103_c0009] আপনি কি এই কথিত বৈষম্যের জন্য অন্য ফেডারেল, স্টেট, বা স্থানীয় এজেন্সি, অথবা ফেডারেল বা স্টেট কোর্টে অভিযোগ দায়ের করেছেন? (যথাযথ স্থানে টিক দিন) হ্যাঁ না যদি আপনার উত্তর হ্যাঁ হয়, তাহলে উপযুক্ত সংস্থায় টিক দিন।
- [p103_c0010] ফেডারেল এজেন্সি ফেডারেল কোর্ট স্টেট এজেন্সি স্টেট কোর্ট স্থানীয় বা শহরের এজেন্সি অন্যান্য
[p103_c0011] আপনি যে এজেন্সির কাছে অভিযোগ দায়ের করেছেন, অনুগ্রহ করে তার যোগাযোগের তথ্য প্রদান করুন: _____
[p103_c0012] জন্ম তারিখ: _____
[p103_c0013] আপনি কি কোনো MTA এজেন্সির কাছে আগে অভিযোগ দায়ের করেছেন? (যথাযথ স্থানে টিক দিন) হ্যাঁ না যদি আপনার উত্তর হ্যাঁ হয়, তাহলে অনুগ্রহ করে তারিখ, এজেন্সির নাম এবং অভিযোগ নম্বর(গুলি) প্রদান করুন।
[p103_c0014] এই অভিযোগের বিষয়ে ভবিষ্যতে যোগাযোগের জন্য আপনার যদি কোনো বিশেষ ব্যবস্থার প্রয়োজন হয়, তাহলে আপনার কোন বিকল্প ফর্ম্যাট প্রয়োজন, তা অনুগ্রহ করে উল্লেখ করুন।
- [p103_c0015] ই-মেল রেইল বড়ো প্রিন্ট (ফন্ট সাইজ উল্লেখ করুন) সাইন ল্যাঙ্গুয়েজ (ভাষা উল্লেখ করুন) _____ দোভাষী (নির্দিষ্ট ভাষা) _____ অন্যান্য _____
[p103_c0016] _শিরোনাম VI এবং সম্পর্কিত বৈষম্যহীনতা_
[p103_c0017] _আইন অভিযোগ ব্যবস্থাপনা রূপরেখা Page # 103 of 1629 - Diversity Committee Meeting 3/23/2026_
[p103_c0018] _পৃষ্ঠা 2 এর 4_

## Page 104

[p104_c0001] MTA-তে অভিযোগ দায়ের করার ক্ষেত্রে আপনার অধিকার ছাড়াও, আপনার কাছে Federal Transit Administration, Office of Civil Rights, Attention: Complaint Team, East Building 5 th Floor-TCR, 1200 New Jersey Avenue, SE, Washington, DC 20590- এর কাছে একটি শিরোনাম VI অভিযোগ দায়ের করার অধিকার রয়েছে। তবে, অনুগ্রহ করে পরামর্শ নিন যে, আপনি যদি কোনো আদালত বা প্রশাসনিক সংস্থা যেমন ইউনাইটেড স্টেটস ইক্যুয়াল এমপ্লয়মেন্ট অপারচুনিটি কমিশন (United States Equal Employment Opportunity Commission - EEOC), New York স্টেট ডিভিশন অফ হিউম্যান রাইটস (New York State Division of Human Rights - NYSDHR), বা অন্য কোনো বহিরাগত ফোরামে অভিযোগ করেন, তাহলে MTA প্রশাসনিকভাবে আপনার কেস বন্ধ করে দেবে এবং বিষয়টি পরিচালনার জন্য এজেস্টির আইন বিভাগে পাঠাবে।
[p104_c0002] আমি এতদ্বারা নিশ্চিত করছি যে, এখানে থাকা তথ্যগুলি আমার সর্বোত্তম জ্ঞান, তথ্য এবং বিশ্বাস অনুসারে সত্য এবং সঠিক।
[p104_c0003] অভিযোগকারীর স্বাক্ষর
[p104_c0004] তারিখ
[p104_c0005] _শিরোনাম VI এবং সম্পর্কিত বৈষম্যহীনতা_
[p104_c0006] _আইন অভিযোগ ব্যবস্থাপনা Center Page # 104 of 1629 - Diversity Committee Meeting 3/23/2026_
[p104_c0007] _পৃষ্ঠা 3 এর 4_
[p104_c0008] _সংশোধিত 05/20/22_

## Page 107

### [p107_c0001] טיטל VI און פארבינדענע נאן-דיסקרימינאציע געזעצן קלאגע מענעדזשמענט בויגן
[p107_c0002] MTA און איר סובסידיערי און אפיליאירטע אגענטורן זענען אנטשלאסן צוצושטעלן נאן-דיסקרימינאציע סערוויס צו פארזיכערן אז קיינער ווערט נישט אויסגעלאזט פון אנטיילנעמען אין, אפגעזאגט די בענעפיטן פון, אדער אויסגעשטעלט צו דיסקרימינאציע אין די דערהאלטונג פון סיי וועלכע פון די MTA'ס פעדעראלע געשטיצטע פראגראם אדער אקטיוויטעט, אריינגערעכנט די סערוויסעס און אנדערע טראנזיט-פארבינדענע פראגראמען אויף די באזיס פון ראסע, קאליר, נאציאנאלע אפשטאם (אריינגערעכנט באגרעניצטע ענגליש קענטעניס (LEP) צוטייט), עלטער, מין, רעליגיע, און/אדער באגרעניצונג.
[p107_c0003] אויב איר פילט אז איר זענט געווארן דיסקרימינירט, ביטע שטעלט צו די נויטיגע אינפארמאציע אונטן צו קענען דורכפירן די פראצעדור פון אייער קלאגע. אויב הילף פאדערט זיך צו אויספולן די בויגן, ביטע זעט די לעצטע בלאט צו טרעפן קאנטאקט נומערן און פאסט אדרעסן פאר הילף.
[p107_c0004] אייער קלאגע מוז איינגעגעבן ווערן אין די 180 טעג פון די געהייסענע דיסקרימינאציע. פארפעלן צו אריינגעבן א קלאגע ביז 180 טעג וועט צוברענגען אז אייער קלאגע זאל ווערן ארויסגעווארפן. די יוצא מן הכלל איז לגבי געשלעכטליכע האראסמענט באשולדיגונגען, וואס קען ווערן איינגעגעבן ביז דריי יאר נאך די אנגעגעבענע פאל, וואס איז אין איינקלאנג מיט די ניו יארק סטעיט געזעץ.
[p107_c0005] ביטע וועלט אויס די MTA אגענטור וואס איר ווילט איינגעבן די קלאגע קעגן: MTA באס MTA קאנסטרוקציע און דעוועלאפמענט MTA הויפטקווארטירן לאנג איילענד רעיל ראוד מעטרא-נארט רעיל ראוד ניו יארק סיטי טראנזיט
[p107_c0006]

```text
Official Use Only (בלויז פאר אפיציעלן באנוץ) Investigator(s) Name: _____ Complaint No: _____
```
### [p107_c0007] 1. באקלאגער: (א באקלאגער איז אן אינדיווידועל אדער גרופע פון אינדיווידועלן וואס געט אן דיסקרימינאציע)
[p107_c0008]

```text
_____: נאמען _____: אדרעס _____: סייט _____: סטעיט: _____ זיף קאוד _____: טעלעפאן # (הויפט): _____ (צווייטע) _____: אי-מעיל: _____ _____: געבט איר אריין די קלאגע פאר זיך אליין? א יין אויב יא, גייט צו #3.
```
### [p107_c0009] 2. נאמען פון מענטש וואס האט געליטן אנגעגעבענע דיסקרימינאציע אדער נישט יושר'דיגע באהאנדלונג: (אויב נישט באקלאגער).

### [p107_c0011] 3. קלאגע אינפארמאציע:
[p107_c0012] וואס איז דער באזיס פון אייער דיסקרימינאציע קלאגע? (צייכנט אלע וואס זענען שייך). ראסע קאליר נאציאנאלע אפשטאם עלטער מין רעליגיע דיסאביליטעט אנדערע אינצידענט דאטום (מאנאט, טאג, יאר): _____ אינצידענט צייט: _____ באס רוט/באס נומער, באן ליניע/ באן קאר נומער, אדער סאבוועי סטאנציע: _____
[p107_c0013] _טיטל VI און פארבינדענע נאן-דיסקרימינאציע געזעצן קלאגע מענעדזשמענט 3/23/2016 2022.20 מא' איבערגעקוקט 1 פון 3 Master Page # 107 of 1629 - Diversity Committee Meeting 3/23/2016_

## Page 108

### [p108_c0001] _____: לאקציע
[p108_c0002] שילדערט די אנגעגעבענע אינצידענט. ערקלערט וואס איז געשען, ווער איז געווען פארמישט, און סיי וועלכע אידענטיפיצירנדע אינפארמאציע פון די מענטשן (ו) וואס איר גלייבט האבן דיסקרימינירט קעגן איר. (אויב פאדערט זיך מער פלאץ, לייגט צו נאך פאפיר אדער נוצט די פארקערטע זייט פון די פארם.)
[p108_c0003] _____ _____ _____
[p108_c0004] ביטע שטעלט צו קאנטאקט אינפארמאציע פאר סיי וועלכע עדות אדער מענטשן מיט אינפארמאציע וואס איז שייך. (אויב פאדערט זיך מער פלאץ, לייגט צו נאך פאפיר אדער נוצט די פארקערטע זייט פון די פארם.)
[p108_c0005] _____: נאמען
[p108_c0006] _____: טעלעפאן # (הויפט): _____ (צווייטע)
### [p108_c0007] 4. קלאגע היסטאריע (אויב איר האט איינגעגעבן די קלאגע מיט נאך אן אגענטור, אדער איינגעגעבן פריערדיגע קלאגעס).
[p108_c0008] האט איר אריינגעגעבן א קלאגע פאר דעם אנגעגעבענע דיסקרימינאציע צו נאך א פעדעראלע, סטעיט, אדער לאקאלע גענטור, אדער צו א פעדעראלע אדער סטעיט געריכט? (צייכנט אן די ריכטיגע ערטער) יא ניין אויב אייער ענטפער איז יא, צייכנט אן די ריכטיגע אגענטור. פעדעראלע אגענטור פעדעראלע געריכט סטעיט אגענטור סטעיט געריכט לאקאלע אדער סיטי אגענטור אנדערע
[p108_c0009] _____: ביטע שטעלט צו קאנטאקט אינפארמאציע פאר די אגענטור וואס איר האט אריינגעגעבן די קלאגע מיט: _____
[p108_c0010] _____: דאטום אריינגעגעבן: _____
[p108_c0011] האט איר אריינגעגעבן א פריערדיגע קלאגע צו א MTA אגענטור? (צייכנט אן די ריכטיגע ערטער) יא ניין אויב אייער ענטפער איז יא, ביטע שטעלט צו די דאטום, אגענטור נאמען, און קלאגע נומער(ן).
[p108_c0012] _____ _____ _____ _____: אויב איר דארפט סיי וועלכע ספעציעלע צושטעלונגען פאר צוקונפטיגע קאמיוניקאציע וועגן די קלאגע, ביטע געבט אן וועלכע אלטערנאטיווע פארמאט איר דארפט.
[p108_c0013] _____: אימעיל ברעיל גרויסע אותיות (געבט אן וועלכע מאס אות) צייכן שפראך (געבט אן וועלכע שפראך) _____ שפראך דאלמעטשער (ספעציפישע שפראך) _____ אנדערע _____
[p108_c0014] אין צוגאב צו אייער רעכט צו אריינגעבן א קלאגע צו די MTA, האט איר די רעכט איינצוגעבן א טיטל VI קלאגע צו די Federal Transit Administration, Office of Civil Rights, Attention: Complaint Team, East Building 5, 1200 New Jersey Avenue, SE, Washington, DC 20590. אבער, ביטע נעמט אין באטראכט אז אויב איר געט אריין א קלאגע צו סיי וועלכע געריכט אדער אדמיניסטראטיווע אגענטור ווי די פאראייניגטע שטאטן גלייכע ארבעט געלעגנהייט קאמיסיע (United States Equal Employment Opportunity Commission, EEOC), די ניו יארק סטעיט אפטיילונג פון מענטשליכע רעכטן (New York State Division of Human Rights, NYSDHR), אדער סיי וועלכע אנדערע דרויסנדיגע פארם, וועט די MTA אדמיניסטראטיוו צומאכן אייער קעיס און אריינברענגען די אגענטור'ס געזעץ אפטיילונג צו איבערנעמען.
[p108_c0015] אך באשטעטיגט דא אז די אינפארמאציע דא איז אמת און פונקטליך לויט מיין בעסטע וויסנשאפט, אינפארמאציע און גלויבן.
[p108_c0016] _____ _____ _____: דאטום _____: באקלאגער'ס אונטערשריפט

## Page 111

### [p111_c0001] Tit VI ak Fòmilè Jesyon Plent ki gen Rapò ak Lwa Ki La pou Konbat Diskriminasyon
[p111_c0002] MTA ak sipòtè l yo ak ajans ki afilye avèk li yo pran angajman pou bay sèvis san diskriminasyon pou nou asire nou yo pa anpeche pèsonn patisipe, refize pèsonn avantaj, oswa pèsonn pa sibi diskriminasyon pandan y ap resevwa nenpòt nan pwogram oswa aktivite MTA gouvènman federal finanse, ak sèvis ak lòt pwogram ki lye avèk transpò akoz ras, koulè, peyi orijin (ak konpetans Anglè limite (limited English proficiency, LEP), laj, sèks, relijyon, ak/oswa andikap.
[p111_c0003] Si w santi yo te sibi diskriminasyon, tanpri bay enfòmasyon nesesè yo anba a yon fason pou fasilite tretman plent ou an. Si w bezwen èd pou w ranpli fòmilè sa a, tanpri gade nan dènye paj la pou w jwenn nimewo telefòn ak adrès postal pou w ka jwenn èd.
[p111_c0004] Ou dwe depoze plent ou a nan yon delè 180 jou kòmanse nan lè ou te sibi diskriminasyon an. Si ou pa depoze yon plent nan 180 jou sa ka lakòz yo rejte plent ou a. Eksepsyon an gen rapò ak akizasyon asèlman seksyèl e yo ka pot plent jiska twazan aprè sa yo di ki te rive a, sa ki konfòm avèk lwa Leta Nouyòk.
[p111_c0005] Tanpri chwazi ajans MTA ou vle depoze plent sa a kont li a: Bis MTA Devlòpman ak Konstriksyon MTA Biwo Santral MTA Long Island Rail Road Metro-North Railroad Transpò Piblik nan Vil Nouyòk
### [p111_c0006] Official Use Only (Pou Itilizasyon Ofisyèl Sèlman)
[p111_c0007] Complaint No: _____ Investigator(s) Name: _____
### [p111_c0008] 1. Moun k ap Pote Plent lan: (Yon moun k ap pote plent an se moun oswa gwoup moun ki sibi disiminasyon)
[p111_c0009] Non Moun k ap Pote Plent lan: _____ Adrès: _____ Vil: _____ Eta: _____ Kòd Postal: _____ # Telefòn (Prensipal): _____ (Dezyèm) _____ Imel: _____
[p111_c0010] Èske se pou yon bagay ki te rive w ou ap depoze plent sa a? Wi Non Si se qi, ale nan #3
### [p111_c0011] 2. Non Moun ki sibi swadizan diskiminasyon an oswa move tretman an: (Si se pa moun k ap pote plent lan)
[p111_c0012] Non: _____ Adrès: _____ Vil: _____ Eta: _____ Kòd Postal: _____ # Telefòn (Prensipal): _____ (Dezyèm) _____ Imel: _____
### [p111_c0013] 3. Enfòmasyon sou Plent lan:
[p111_c0014] Kisa ki alabaz plent diskriminasyon w lan? (Kwoche tout sa ki aplikab yo.)
[p111_c0015] Ras Koulè Peyi moun nan sòti Laj Sèks Relijyon Andikap Lòt _____
[p111_c0016] Dat Ensidan an (Mwa, Jou, Ane): _____ Lè Ensidan an: _____
[p111_c0017] Pakou Bis la/Nimewo Bis la, Lij Tren/ Nimewo konpatiman tren an, oswa Estasyon Tren an: _____
[p111_c0018] _Tit VI ak Fòmilè Jesyon Plent ki gen Rapò_
[p111_c0019] _Page 1 sou 3_
[p111_c0020] _Rev. 20/05/22_
[p111_c0021] _ak Lwa Ki La pou Konbat Diskriminasyon #111 of 1629 - Diversity Committee Meeting 3/23/2026_

## Page 112

[p112_c0001] Ki kote: _____
[p112_c0002] Deskri ensidan an. Eksplike kisa ki te pase, kiyès ki te enplike, ak nenpòt enfòmasyon ki ka idantifye moun ou kwè ki fè diskriminasyon kont ou a. (Si w bezwen plis espas, tanpri itilize dèyè do fòmilè a oswa tache plis fèy papye oswa itilize do fòmilè sa a.) _____
[p112_c0003] _____ _____ _____
[p112_c0004] Tanpri bay enfòmasyon kontak nenpòt ki temwen oswa moun ki gen bonjan enfòmasyon. (Si w bezwen plis espas, tanpri itilize dèyè do fòmilè a oswa tache plis fèy papye oswa itilize do fòmilè sa a.)
[p112_c0005] Non: _____
[p112_c0006] # Telefòn (Prensipal): _____ (Dezyèm:) _____
### [p112_c0007] 4. Istwa Plenyan an (si w depoze plent sa a nan yon lòt ajans, oswa ou depoze plent deja.)
[p112_c0008] Èske ou te depoze plent pou diskriminasyon ou panse w sibi a nan yon lòt ajans federal, leta, onivo lokal oswa nan yon tribunal federal oswa leta? ( Kwoche epas apwopriye a ) Wi Non Si repons ou a se wi, kwoche ajans apwopriye.
- [p112_c0009] Ajans Federal Tribunal Federal Ajans Eta a Tribunal Leta Ajans Lokal oswa Vil la Lòt
[p112_c0010] Tanpri bay enfòmasyon kontak ajans ou depoze plent ou a ladan tou a: _____
[p112_c0011] _____
[p112_c0012] Dat ou te Depoze l: _____
[p112_c0013] Èske ou te depoze yon plent nan Ajans MTA deja? ( Kwoche epas apwopriye a ) Wi Non
[p112_c0014] Si repons ou a se wi, tanpri bay dat, non ajans lan ak nimewo plent lan (yo).
[p112_c0015] _____
[p112_c0016] Si w bezwen nenpòt ki aranjman espesyal pou kominiksyon alavni konsènan plent sa a, tanpri presize ki lòt fòma ou bezwen.
- [p112_c0017] Imel Bray Ekriti ki Gwo (presize gwosè a) Lang Siy (presize lang lan) _____ Entèprèt Lang (lang presi) _____ Lòt _____
[p112_c0018] _____
[p112_c0019] Anplis de dwa ou genyen pou depoze yon plent nan MTA, ou gen dwa pou depoze yon plent Tit VI nan Federal Transit Administration, Office of Civil Rights, Attention: Complaint Team, East Building 5 th Floor-TCR, 1200 New Jersey Avenue, SE, Washington, DC 20590. Men ou dwe konnen si w depoze plent sa nan nenpòt tribunal oswa ajans administrasyon, tankou United States Equal Employment Opportunity Commission (EEOC), New York State Division of Human Rights (NYSDHR), oswa nenpòt lòt fowòm ekstèn, MTA pral fèmen dosye w la sou plan administratif epi refere afè a bay Depatman Lwa Ajans lan pou yo jere.
[p112_c0020] Nan dokiman sa mwen dakò enfòmasyon ki nan plent sa vrè e kòrèk dapre tout konèsans, enfòmasyon ak kwayans mwen.
[p112_c0021] _____ Siyati Moun Ki depoze plent lan
[p112_c0022] _____ Dat
[p112_c0023] _Tit VI ak Fòmilè Jesyon Plent ki gen Rapò_

## Page 115

### [p115_c0001] Title VI 및 관련 비차별법 불만 관리 양식
[p115_c0002] MTA 와 제휴 기관 및 부속 기관은 MTA 의 연방 자금 지원 프로그램 또는 활동에 대해 참여가 제외되거나 혜택이 거부되거나 차별을 받는 사람이 없도록 차별 없는 서비스를 제공하기 위해 최선을 다하고 있으며, 여기에는 인종, 피부색, 출신 국가(제한된 영어 구사 능력(LEP) 접근 포함), 연령, 성별, 종교 및/또는 장애에 근거한 서비스 및 기타 대중교통 관련 프로그램이 포함됩니다.
[p115_c0003] 차별 대우를 받았다고 생각되면 불만 처리를 원활히 진행할 수 있도록 아래 필요한 정보를 제공하십시오. 이 양식을 작성하는 데 도움이 필요한 경우 마지막 페이지를 참조하여 도움을 받을 연락처 전화번호와 우편 주소를 찾으십시오.
[p115_c0004] 차별이 의심되는 날로부터 180 일 이내에 불만을 제기해야 합니다. 180 일 이내에 불만을 제기하지 않으면 불만이 기각됩니다. 예외로 성희롱 혐의와 관련된 경우 뉴욕주 법에 따라 사건 발생 후 최대 3년까지 불만을 제기할 수 있습니다.
[p115_c0005] 이 불만을 제기할 MTA 기관을 선택하십시오: MTA Bus MTA Construction and Development MTA Headquarters Long Island Rail Road Metro-North Railroad New York City Transit
### [p115_c0006] Official Use Only (공무에만 해당)
[p115_c0007] Complaint No: _____ Investigator(s) Name: _____
### [p115_c0008] 1. 신고자: (신고자는 차별을 주장하는 사람 또는 그 사람이 속한 단체입니다)
[p115_c0009] 신고자 이름: _____
[p115_c0010] 주소: _____
[p115_c0011] 시: _____ 주: _____ 우편번호 _____
[p115_c0012] 전화번호(기본): _____ (보조): _____
[p115_c0013] 이메일: _____
[p115_c0014] 귀하가 직접 이 불만을 제기하고 있습니까?: 예 아니요 예인 경우 3 번으로 가십시오.
### [p115_c0015] 2. 차별 또는 부당한 대우를 받은 사람의 이름: (신고자가 아닌 경우.)
[p115_c0016] 이름: _____
[p115_c0017] 주소: _____
[p115_c0018] 시: _____ 주: _____ 우편번호: _____
[p115_c0019] 전화번호(기본): _____ (보조) _____ 이메일: _____
### [p115_c0020] 3. 불만 제기 정보:
[p115_c0021] 차별에 대한 불만의 근거는 무엇입니까? (해당 항목에 모두 체크하십시오.)
[p115_c0022] 인종 피부색 국적 연령 성별 종교 장애 기타 _____
[p115_c0023] 사건 발생 날짜(월, 일, 년): _____ 사건 발생 시간: _____
[p115_c0024] 버스 노선/버스 번호, 기차 노선/기차 번호 또는 지하철역: _____
[p115_c0025] _Title VI 및 관련 비차별법 Master Page #115 of 1629 - Diversity Committee Meeting 3/23/2026_

[p116_c0001] 위치: _____
[p116_c0002] 해당 사건에 대해 설명하십시오. 무슨 일이 일어났는지, 누가 연루되었는지, 그리고 귀하를 차별했다고 생각하는 사람(들)의 식별 정보를 설명하십시오. (더 많은 공간이 필요하면 추가 용지를 첨부하거나 이 양식의 뒷면을 사용하십시오.) _____
[p116_c0003] 증인이나 관련 정보를 가진 사람의 연락처 정보를 제공하십시오. (더 많은 공간이 필요하면 추가 용지를 첨부하거나 이 양식의 뒷면을 사용하십시오.)

### [p116_c0006] 4. 불만 사항 기록(다른 기관에 이 불만을 제기했거나 이전에 불만을 제기한 경우)
[p116_c0007] 이 차별 혐의에 대해 다른 연방, 주 또는 지역 기관이나 연방 또는 주 법원에 불만을 제기한 적이 있습니까?
[p116_c0008] (해당 칸에 체크하십시오) 예 아니요 답변이 예인 경우 해당 기관에 체크하십시오.
- [p116_c0009] 연방 기관 연방 법원 주 기관 주 법원 지역 또는 시 기관 기타
[p116_c0010] 불만을 제기한 기관의 연락처 정보를 제공하십시오. _____
[p116_c0011] 불만을 제기한 날짜: _____
[p116_c0012] 이전에 MTA 기관에 불만을 제기한 적이 있습니까? (해당 칸에 체크하십시오) 예 아니요
[p116_c0013] 답변이 예인 경우 날짜, 기관 이름 및 불만 번호를 제공하십시오.
[p116_c0014] 이 불만과 관련하여 향후 의사소통을 위해 특별한 편의 서비스가 필요한 경우 원하는 대체 수단을 지정하십시오.
- [p116_c0015] 이메일 접자 큰 활자(글꼴 크기 지정) 수화(언어 지정) _____ 언어 통역사(특정 언어) _____ 기타 _____
[p116_c0016] 귀하는 MTA 에 불만을 제기할 수 있는 권리와 더불어 Federal Transit Administration, Office of Civil Rights, Attention: Complaint Team, East Building 5th Floor-TCR, 1200 New Jersey Avenue, SE, Washington, DC 20590 에 Title VI 불만을 제기할 권리가 있습니다. 그러나 미국 평등 고용 기회 위원회(EEOC), 뉴욕주 인권국(NYSDHR) 등과 같은 법원이나 행정기관 또는 기타 외부 포럼에 불만을 제기하는 경우, MTA 는 귀하의 사건을 행정상으로 종결하고 이 사건을 기관의 법무부서로 회부하여 처리할 것입니다.
[p116_c0017] 본인은 여기에 포함된 정보가 본인의 지식, 정보 및 신념에 부합하며 사실임을 확인합니다.
[p116_c0018] 신고자 서명 _____ 날짜 _____

## Page 119

### [p119_c0001] الباب السادس وقوانين عدم التمييز ذات الصلة نموذج إدارة الشكاوى
[p119_c0002] تلتزم كل من هيئة MTA والشركات التابعة لها والوكالات المتعاقنة معها بتقديم خدمات خالية من التمييز لضمان عدم إقصاء أي شخص من المشاركة في أي برنامج أو نشاط تُظهِم MTA بتحويل فيدرالي، ولا حرمانه من الاستفادة منها، ويشمل ذلك الخدمات أو البرامج الأخرى ذات الصلة بالنقل العام، سواء كان ذلك التمييز على أساس العرق، و/أو اللون، و/أو المنشأ الوطني (بما في ذلك انخفاض مستوى إقناع اللغة الإنجليزية)، و/أو السن، و/أو الجنس، و/أو الديانة، و/أو الإعاقة.
[p119_c0003] وإذا شعرت بأنك ضحية للتمييز، فيرجى تقديم المعلومات الضرورية أثناء لتبسيط إجراءات معالجة شكاوك. وإذا كنت بحاجة إلى مساعدة لإكمال هذا النموذج، فيرجى الاطلاع على الصفحة الأخيرة، حيث ستجد أرقام هواتف للاتصال وعناوين مراسلة بريدية خاصة بالمساعدة.
[p119_c0004] يجب تقديم شكوك في غضون 180 يوماً من تاريخ تعرضك للتمييز المزعوم. واعلم أنه سيتم تجاهل شكوك إذا لم تتمكن من تقديمها في غضون 180 يوماً. ويُستثنى من تلك المدة المزعوم المتعلقة بالتحرش الجنسي، والتي يمكن تقديمها خلال مدة تصل إلى ثلاث سنوات بعد الحادث المزعوم، وذلك طبقاً لقانون ولاية نيويورك.
[p119_c0005] يُرجى اختيار وكالة MTA التي تود تقديم شكوك ضدها: MTA Headquarters MTA Construction and Development MTA Bus Long Island Rail Road Metro-North Railroad New York City Transit
[p119_c0006]

```text
لاستخدام الرسمي فقط رقم الشكوى: _____ اسم المُحَقَّق (المُحَقَّقين): _____
```
### [p119_c0007] 1. مُقدِّم الشكوى: (مُقدِّم الشكوى هو الفرد أو مجموعة الأفراد الذين يدَّعون تعرضهم للتمييز)
[p119_c0008]

```text
اسم مُقدِّم الشكوى: _____ العنوان: _____ المدينة: _____ الولاية: _____ الرمز البريدي: _____ رقم الهاتف (الأساسي): _____ (الثانوي) _____ البريد الإلكتروني: _____
```
[p119_c0009] هل تُقدِّم الشكوى نيابةً عن نفسك؟ نعم لا إذا كانت إجابتك "نعم"، فانتقل إلى البند رقم 3.
### [p119_c0010] 2. اسم الشخص الذي يدَّعي تعرضه للتمييز أو المعاملة المُجحفة: (إذا كان مُقدِّم الشكوى شخصاً آخر)
[p119_c0011]

```text
الاسم: _____ العنوان: _____ المدينة: _____ الولاية: _____ الرمز البريدي: _____ رقم الهاتف (الأساسي): _____ (الثانوي) _____ البريد الإلكتروني: _____
```
### [p119_c0012] 3. معلومات الشكوى:
[p119_c0013]

```text
ما الأساس الذي تقوم عليه شكوك بشأن التمييز؟ (حدِّد جميع ما ينطبق). العرق اللون المنشأ الوطني السن الجنس الديانة الإعاقة غير ذلك تاريخ الحادث (الشهر، اليوم، السنة): _____ وقت الحادث: _____ مسار الحالة / رقم الحالة؛ خط الطوارئ / رقم عربية الطوارئ؛ أو محطة الاتفاق: _____ الموقع: _____
```
[p119_c0014] _إصدار 20 مايو 2022_
[p119_c0015] _الصفحة 1 من 3_
[p119_c0016] _الباب السادس وقوانين عدم التمييز ذات الصلة_
[p119_c0017] _Master Page # 119 of 1629 - Diversity Committee Meeting 3/23/2026_
[p119_c0018] _نموذج إدارة الشكاوى_

## Page 120

[p120_c0001] صف الحادث المزعوم. اشرح ما حدث، ومن شارك فيه، وأي معلومات لتحديد هوية الشخص (الأشخاص) الذي تظن أنه مارس التمييز ضدك. (إذا احتجت إلى مساعدة إضافية، فإنه يمكنك إرفاق صفحات إضافية، أو استخدام الوجه الخلفي من هذا النموذج)
[p120_c0002] يُرجى تقديم معلومات الاتصال الخاصة بأي شهود أو أشخاص لديهم معلومات ذات صلة. (إذا احتجت إلى مساعدة إضافية، فإنه يمكنك إرفاق صفحات إضافية، أو استخدام الوجه الخلفي من هذا النموذج)
[p120_c0003]

```text
الاسم: _____ رقم الهاتف (الأساسي): _____ (الثانوي): _____
```
### [p120_c0004] 4. الشكاوى السابقة (إذا سبق لك تقديم هذه الشكاوى لدى وكالة أخرى، أو سبق لك تقديم شكاوى أخرى).
[p120_c0005] هل سبق لك تقديم شكوى بشأن حادث التمييز المزعوم لدى أي وكالة فيدرالية، أو وكالة تابعة للولاية، أو وكالة محلية أخرى، أو لدى أي محكمة فيدرالية أو محكمة تابعة للولاية؟ (حذّر / الإجابة المناسبة) نعم لا، إذا كانت إجابتك "نعم"، فحذّر الوكالة المناسبة.
- [p120_c0006] وكالة فيدرالية محكمة فيدرالية وكالة تابعة للولاية محكمة محلية أو تابعة للمدينة غير ذلك
[p120_c0007] يُرجى تقديم معلومات الاتصال الخاصة بالوكالة التي تقدّمت إليها بالشكاوى: _____
[p120_c0008]

```text
تاريخ التقديم: _____
```
[p120_c0009] هل سبق لك تقديم أي شكوى لدى أي وكالة تابعة لـ MTA؟ (حذّر / الإجابة المناسبة) نعم لا إذا كانت إجابتك "نعم"، فيُرجى تقديم التاريخ، واسم الوكالة، ورقم الشكاوى.
[p120_c0010] إذا كنت بحاجة إلى أي ترتيبات تيسيرية خاصة للتواصل في المستقبل بشأن هذه الشكاوى، فيُرجى تحديد التنسيق البديل الذي تحتاج إليه.
- [p120_c0011] البريد الإلكتروني برايل طباعة كبيرة (حذّر حجم الخط) لغة الإشارة (حذّر اللغة) مترجم فوري (حذّر اللغة) غير ذلك
[p120_c0012] بالإضافة إلى حقه في تقديم شكوى لدى MTA، فإنه يحق لك أيضاً تقديم شكوى بموجب الباب السادس لدى إدارة النقل الفيدرالية، مكتب الحقوق المدنية؛ عنابة: Complaint 5 Team, East Building 1200 New Jersey Avenue, SE, Washington, DC 20590. ومع ذلك، يُرجى العلم بأنه في حال تقديمك شكوى لدى أي محكمة أو وكالة إدارية، مثل لجنة تكافؤ فرص العمل في الولايات المتحدة (EEOC)، أو إدارة حقوق الإنسان في ولاية نيويورك (NYSDHR)، أو لدى أي جهة خارجية أخرى، فستُشغَل MTA حالئذ إدارياً وستحيلها إلى القسم القانوني لدى الوكالة للتعامل معها.
[p120_c0013] أقر بموجب هذه الفقرة بأن المعلومات الواردة في هذا النموذج هي معلومات حقيقية وصحيحة بحسب ما استقر في علمي وما لدي من معلومات وقناعة.
[p120_c0014]

```text
توقيع مقدم الشكاوى: _____ التاريخ _____
```
[p120_c0015] _إصدار 20 مايو 2022_
[p120_c0016] _الصفحة 2 من 3_

## Page 123

### [p123_c0001] Tytuł VI i powiązane przepisy dotyczące zapobiegania dyskryminacji
[p123_c0002] MTA oraz jej spółki zależne i stowarzyszone dokładają wszelkich starań, aby świadczyć usługi w sposób niedyskryminujący, zapewniając, że żadna osoba nie zostanie wykluczona z udziału, nie uzyska korzyści ani nie będzie dyskryminowana podczas korzystania z jakiegokolwiek programu lub działania MTA finansowanego ze środków federalnych, w tym usług i innych programów związanych z transportem ze względu na rasę, kolor skóry, pochodzenie narodowe (w tym ograniczoną znajomość języka angielskiego (LEP)), wiek, płeć, religię i/lub niepełnosprawność
[p123_c0003] Jeśli uważają Państwo, że doświadczyli dyskryminacji, prosimy o podanie poniżej niezbędnych informacji, aby ułatwić rozpatrzenie Państwa skargi. Jeśli potrzebują Państwo pomocy w wypełnieniu tego formularza, prosimy zapoznać się z ostatnią stroną, na której znajdują się numery telefonów i adresy, pod które można się zwrócić o pomoc.
[p123_c0004] Skargę należy złożyć w ciągu 180 dni od wystąpienia domniemanej dyskryminacji. Brak złożenia skargi w ciągu 180 dni spowoduje jej oddalenie. Wyjątek stanowią zarzuty dotyczące molestowania seksualnego, które można zgłaszać do trzech lat od domniemanego zdarzenia, zgodnie z prawem stanu Nowy Jork.
[p123_c0005] Proszę wybrać agencję MTA, przeciwko której chcą Państwo złożyć skargę: MTA Bus MTA Construction and Development MTA Headquarters Long Island Rail Road Metro-North Railroad New York City Transit
### [p123_c0006] Tylko do użytku służbowego
[p123_c0007] Nr skargi: _____ Imiona i nazwiska osób rozpatrujących skargę: _____
### [p123_c0008] 1. Strona powodowa: (Strona powodowa to osoba lub grupa osób, które zgłaszają zarzut dyskryminacji)
[p123_c0009] Imię i nazwisko Strony powodowej: _____
[p123_c0010] Adres: _____
[p123_c0011] Miasto: _____ Stan: _____ Kod pocztowy: _____
[p123_c0012] Nr telefonu (główny): _____ (dodatkowy) _____
[p123_c0013] Adres e-mail: _____
[p123_c0014] Czy składają Państwo tę skargę we własnym imieniu? Tak Nie Jeśli tak, proszę przejść do sekcji 3.
### [p123_c0015] 2. Imię i nazwisko osoby, która padła ofiarą domniemanej dyskryminacji lub niesprawiedliwego traktowania (jeśli jest to osoba inna niż Strona powodowa).
[p123_c0016] Imię i nazwisko: _____
[p123_c0017] Adres: _____
[p123_c0018] Miasto: _____ Stan: _____ Kod pocztowy: _____
[p123_c0019] Nr telefonu (główny): _____ (dodatkowy) _____ Adres e-mail: _____
### [p123_c0020] 3. Informacje dotyczące skargi:
[p123_c0021] Na jakiej podstawie składają Państwo skargę dotyczącą dyskryminacji? (Proszę zaznaczyć wszystkie pasujące odpowiedzi).
[p123_c0022] Rasa Kolor skóry Pochodzenie narodowe Wiek Płeć Religia Niepełnosprawność
[p123_c0023] Inny powód _____
[p123_c0024] Data wystąpienia zdarzenia (miesiąc, dzień, rok): _____ Godzina wystąpienia zdarzenia: _____
[p123_c0025] Trasa autobusu / numer autobusu, linia kolejowa / numer wagonu lub stacja metra: _____
[p123_c0026] Lokalizacja: _____
[p123_c0027] _Tytuł VI i powiązane przepisy dotyczące zapobiegania dyskryminacji_
[p123_c0028] _Strona 1 z 3_
[p123_c0029] _Master Page # 123 of 1629 - Diversity Committee Meeting 3/23/2026_
[p123_c0030] _Ver. 05/20/22_

## Page 124

[p124_c0001] Proszę opisać domniemane zdarzenie. Proszę wyjaśnić, co się wydarzyło, kto w nim uczestniczył oraz podać wszelkie informacje pozwalające zidentyfikować wszelkie osoby, które według Państwa dopuściły się dyskryminacji (jeśli potrzebują Państwo więcej miejsca, proszę dołączyć dodatkowe kartki lub wykorzystać tylną stronę niniejszego formularza).
[p124_c0002] Proszę podać dane kontaktowe wszystkich świadków lub osób mogących udzielić istotnych informacji (jeśli potrzebują Państwo więcej miejsca, proszę dołączyć dodatkowe kartki lub wykorzystać tylną stronę niniejszego formularza).
[p124_c0003] Imię i nazwisko: _____
[p124_c0004] Nr telefonu (główny): _____ (dodatkowy): _____
### [p124_c0005] 4. Historia skarg (jeśli złożyli Państwo tę skargę do innej agencji lub składali Państwo wcześniej inne skargi).
[p124_c0006] Czy złożyli Państwo skargę dotyczącą tej domniemanej dyskryminacji do innej agencji federalnej, stanowej lub lokalnej albo do sądu federalnego lub stanowego? (Proszę zaznaczyć odpowiednie pole) Tak Nie Jeśli odpowiedź brzmi „Tak”, proszę zaznaczyć odpowiednią agencję.
[p124_c0007] Agencja federalna
[p124_c0008] Sąd federalny
[p124_c0009] Agencja stanowa
[p124_c0010] Sąd stanowy
[p124_c0011] Agencja lokalna lub miejska
[p124_c0012] Inny podmiot
[p124_c0013] Proszę podać dane kontaktowe agencji, do której również złożyli Państwo skargę. _____
[p124_c0014] Data wysłania skargi: _____
[p124_c0015] Czy wcześniej składali Państwo skargę do agencji MTA? (Proszę zaznaczyć odpowiednie pole) Tak Nie
[p124_c0016] Jeśli odpowiedź brzmi „Tak”, proszę podać datę, nazwę agencji i numery skarg.
[p124_c0017] Jeśli w ramach przyszłej komunikacji dotyczącej tej skargi potrzebują Państwo specjalnych udogodnień, proszę określić, jakiego alternatywnego formatu Państwo potrzebują.
[p124_c0018] E-mail Pismo Braille'a Duży druk (proszę podać rozmiar czcionki) Język migowy (proszę podać język)
[p124_c0019] Usługi tłumaczeniowe (proszę podać język) _____ Inne _____
[p124_c0020] Oprócz prawa do złożenia skargi do MTA przysługuje Państwu prawo do złożenia skargi na podstawie Tytułu VI do Federalnej administracji transportu publicznego (Federal Transit Administration, FTA), do Biura praw obywatelskich (Office of Civil Rights) z dopiskiem: Complaint Team, East Building 5 th Floor-TCR, 1200 New Jersey Avenue, SE, Washington, DC 20590. Należy jednak mieć na uwadze, że w przypadku złożenia skargi do dowolnego sądu lub organu administracyjnego, takiego jak Komisja ds. równych szans zatrudnienia Stanów Zjednoczonych (United States Equal Employment Opportunity Commission, EEOC), Wydział praw człowieka stanu Nowy Jork (New York State Division of Human Rights, NYSDHR) lub do innego zewnętrznego organu, MTA zamknie Państwa sprawę w trybie administracyjnym i przekaze ją do rozpatrzenia przez dział prawny agencji.
[p124_c0021] Oświadczam, iż informacje zawarte w niniejszym dokumencie są prawdziwe i poprawne zgodnie z moją najlepszą wiedzą, informacjami i przekonaniem.
[p124_c0022] Podpis Strony powodowej
[p124_c0023] Data
[p124_c0024] _Tytuł VI i powiązane przepisy dotyczące zapobiegania dyskryminacji Formularz postępowania ze skargami_
[p124_c0025] _Master Page # 124 of 1629_
[p124_c0026] _Strona 2 z 3_
[p124_c0027] _Diversity Committee Meeting 3/23/2026_
[p124_c0028] _Ver. 05/20/22_

### [p127_c0004] There's still time!
[p127_c0005] Take our Fall Customers Count survey and help us improve service! You can enter a drawing to Take the survey now! win one of fifty $100 OMNY Cards. This survey is available at https://www.transitquality.com/form/SV_3UhtJEXWxt4PdNI?link=2 ×
[p127_c0006] Updated October 29th at 3:07pm
[p127_c0007] 🏠(/) > Transparency(/transparency) > Title VI/Non-Discrimination Policy (/transparency/title-vi) > Nondiscrimination Notice to the Public (/transparency/title-vi/notice-to-public)
### [p127_c0008] 非歧视公众须知
[p127_c0009] Updated Apr 26, 2024
[p127_c0010] 要申请获得免费的语言帮助服务，您可联系 511。
### [p127_c0011] Title VI 和相关非歧视投诉
[p127_c0012] Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA) 及其关联单位和附属机构致力于确保所有人都可以参与其提供的计划、服务或活动，享受其福利，不会因为种族、肤色或原籍国（包括英语水平有限）（受《1964 年民权法案》Title VI 保护），以及年龄、性别、残障或宗教（受其他联邦交通运输法（49 U.S.C. § 5332）保护）而受到歧视。如需提交书面投诉或请求获取关于 MTA 的 Title VI 和相关非歧视法律政策的更多信息，请点击此处 (/transparency/title-vi/filing-a-complaint) 联系具体的 MTA 多元化与平等机会部门，或点击此处 ( https://new.mta.info/document/105551 ) 获取投诉表。
[p127_c0013] MTA Headquarters Department of Diversity and Civil Rights 2 Broadway, 16th Floor New York, NY 10004 (800) 466-8577
### [p127_c0014] 向 U.S. Department of Transportation 提交投诉
[p127_c0015] 投诉者也可以直接投诉至： U.S. Department of Transportation Federal Transit Administration Office of Civil Rights Complaint Team, East Building, 5th Floor—TCR 1200 New Jersey Ave SE Washington, DC 20590
[p127_c0016] _Master Page # 127 of 1629 - Diversity Committee Meeting 3/23/2026_

## Page 128

### [p128_c0001] Title VI 和相关非歧视法律投诉管理表
[p128_c0002] MTA 及其关联单位和附属机构致力于提供非歧视性服务，以确保所有人均不会被排除在 MTA 的任何联邦资助计划或活动之外，在所有服务和公共交通相关计划中不被剥夺任何权利，且不会因种族、肤色、原籍国（包括英语水平有限 (LEP)）、年龄、性别、宗教和/或残疾而遭受歧视。
[p128_c0003] 如果您认为自己受到了歧视，请提供下列必要信息，以便我们处理您的投诉。如需协助填写本表，请参阅最后一页以找到联络电话和邮寄地址。
[p128_c0004] 您的投诉必须在指控的歧视行为发生后 180 日内提交。未能在 180 日内提交投诉将导致投诉被撤销。涉及性骚扰的指控属于例外情形；根据纽约州相关法律，涉及性骚扰的指控的有效投诉期为三年。
[p128_c0005] 请选择您想要投诉的 MTA 机构： MTA Bus MTA Construction and Development MTA 总部
[p128_c0006] Long Island Rail Road Metro-North Railroad New York City Transit
### [p128_c0007] Official Use Only (仅限内部使用)
[p128_c0008] Complaint No: _____ Investigator(s) Name: _____

[p128_c0014] 电子邮件：_____

[p129_c0026] 除了有权向 MTA 提交投诉之外，您还有权向下列机构提交 Title VI 投诉 Federal Transit Administration, Office of Civil Rights, Attention: Complaint Team, East Building 5 th Floor-TCR, 1200 New Jersey Avenue, SE, Washington, DC 20590。请注意，如果您向任何法院或行政机构（例如 United States Equal Employment Opportunity Commission (EEOC)、New York State Division of Human Rights (NYSDHR)）或其他外部法庭提交了此投诉，MTA 将在行政上终结您的个案，并将该事务转交给该机构的法律部门处理。

[p132_c0007] (/) > Transparency(/transparency) > Title VI/Non-Discrimination Policy (/transparency/title-vi) > Nondiscrimination Notice to the Public (/transparency/title-vi/notice-to-public)
### [p132_c0008] 비차별 공지
[p132_c0009] Updated Apr 26, 2024
[p132_c0010] 무료 언어 지원 서비스를 요청하려면 511로 문의하십시오.
### [p132_c0011] Title VI 및 관련 비차별 불만
[p132_c0012] MTA(Metropolitan Transportation Authority)와 그 제휴 기관 및 부속 기관은 1964년 제정된 민권법 Title VI에 따라 인종, 피부색 또는 출신 국가(제한된 영어 구사 능력 포함) 및 연방 교통법(49 U.S.C. § 5332)에 따라 연령, 성별, 장애 또는 종교를 이유로 어느 누구도 프로그램, 서비스 또는 활동의 참여에서 제외되거나 해택이 거부되거나 차별을 받지 않도록 하기 위해 노력하고 있습니다.서면으로 불만을 제기하거나 MTA의 Title VI 및 관련 비차별 법률 정책에 대한 자세한 정보를 요청하려면 여기 (/transparency/title-vi/filing-a-complaint)를 클릭하거나 불만 양식을 보려면 여기 (https://new.mta.info/document/105546)를 클릭하여 특정 MTA 다양성 및 평등 기회 부서에 문의할 수 있습니다.
[p132_c0013] MTA Headquarters Department of Diversity and Civil Rights 2 Broadway, 16th Floor New York, NY 10004 (800) 466-8577
### [p132_c0014] 미국 교통부에 불만 제기
[p132_c0015] 다음 기관에 직접 불만을 제기할 수도 있습니다: U.S. Department of Transportation Federal Transit Administration Office of Civil Rights Complaint Team East Building, 5th Floor—TCR 1200 New Jersey Ave. SE Washington, DC 20590
[p132_c0016] _Master Page # 132 of 1629 - Diversity Committee Meeting 3/23/2026_

## Page 133

### [p133_c0001] Title VI 및 관련 비차별법 불만 관리 양식
[p133_c0002] MTA 와 제휴 기관 및 부속 기관은 MTA 의 연방 자금 지원 프로그램 또는 활동에 대해 참여가 제외되거나 혜택이 거부되거나 차별을 받는 사람이 있도록 차별 없는 서비스를 제공하기 위해 최선을 다하고 있으며, 여기에는 인종, 피부색, 출신 국가(제한된 영어 구사 능력(LEP) 접근 포함), 연령, 성별, 종교 및/또는 장애에 근거한 서비스 및 기타 대중교통 관련 프로그램이 포함됩니다.
[p133_c0003] 차별 대우를 받았다고 생각되면 불만 처리를 원활히 진행할 수 있도록 아래 필요한 정보를 제공하십시오. 이 양식을 작성하는 데 도움이 필요한 경우 마지막 페이지를 참조하여 도움을 받을 연락처 전화번호와 우편 주소를 찾으십시오.
[p133_c0004] 차별이 의심되는 날로부터 180 일 이내에 불만을 제기해야 합니다. 180 일 이내에 불만을 제기하지 않으면 불만이 기각됩니다. 예외로 성희롱 혐의와 관련된 경우 뉴욕주 법에 따라 사건 발생 후 최대 3년까지 불만을 제기할 수 있습니다.
[p133_c0005] 이 불만을 제기할 MTA 기관을 선택하십시오: MTA Bus MTA Construction and Development MTA Headquarters Long Island Rail Road Metro-North Railroad New York City Transit
### [p133_c0006] Official Use Only (공무에만 해당)
[p133_c0007] Complaint No: _____ Investigator(s) Name: _____
### [p133_c0008] 1. 신고자: (신고자는 차별을 주장하는 사람 또는 그 사람이 속한 단체입니다)
[p133_c0009] 신고자 이름: _____
[p133_c0010] 주소: _____
[p133_c0011] 시: _____ 주: _____ 우편번호 _____
[p133_c0012] 전화번호(기본): _____ (보조): _____
[p133_c0013] 이메일: _____
[p133_c0014] 귀하가 직접 이 불만을 제기하고 있습니까? 예 아니요 예인 경우 3 번으로 가십시오.
### [p133_c0015] 2. 차별 또는 부당한 대우를 받은 사람의 이름: (신고자가 아닌 경우.)

### [p133_c0020] 3. 불만 제기 정보:
[p133_c0021] 차별에 대한 불만의 근거는 무엇입니까? (해당 항목에 모두 체크하십시오.)
[p133_c0022] 인종 피부색 국적 연령 성별 종교 장애 기타 _____
[p133_c0023] 사건 발생 날짜(월, 일, 년): _____ 사건 발생 시간: _____
[p133_c0024] 버스 노선/버스 번호, 기차 노선/기차 번호 또는 지하철역:
[p133_c0025] _Title VI 및 관련 비차별법 불만 관리 양식_
[p133_c0026] _페이지 1/3_

## Page 134

[p134_c0001] 위치: _____
[p134_c0002] 해당 사건에 대해 설명하십시오. 무슨 일이 일어났는지, 누가 연루되었는지, 그리고 귀하를 차별했다고 생각하는 사람(들)의 식별 정보를 설명하십시오. (더 많은 공간이 필요하면 추가 용지를 첨부하거나 이 양식의 뒷면을 사용하십시오.) _____
[p134_c0003] _____
[p134_c0004] 증인이나 관련 정보를 가진 사람의 연락처 정보를 제공하십시오. (더 많은 공간이 필요하면 추가 용지를 첨부하거나 이 양식의 뒷면을 사용하십시오.)
[p134_c0005] 이름: _____
[p134_c0006] 전화번호(기본): _____ (보조): _____
### [p134_c0007] 4. 불만 사항 기록(다른 기관에 이 불만을 제기했거나 이전에 불만을 제기한 경우)
[p134_c0008] 이 차별 혐의에 대해 다른 연방, 주 또는 지역 기관이나 연방 또는 주 법원에 불만을 제기한 적이 있습니까?
[p134_c0009] (해당 간에 체크하십시오) 예 아니요 답변이 예인 경우 해당 기관에 체크하십시오.
- [p134_c0010] 연방 기관 연방 법원 주 기관 주 법원 지역 또는 시 기관 기타
[p134_c0011] 불만을 제기한 기관의 연락처 정보를 제공하십시오. _____
[p134_c0012] 불만을 제기한 날짜: _____
[p134_c0013] 이전에 MTA 기관에 불만을 제기한 적이 있습니까? (해당 간에 체크하십시오) 예 아니요
[p134_c0014] 답변이 예인 경우 날짜, 기관 이름 및 불만 번호를 제공하십시오.
[p134_c0015] 이 불만과 관련하여 향후 의사소통을 위해 특별한 편의 서비스가 필요한 경우 원하는 대체 수단을 지정하십시오.
- [p134_c0016] 이메일 전자 큰 활자(글꼴 크기 지정) 수화(언어 지정) _____ 언어 통역사(특정 언어) _____ 기타 _____
[p134_c0017] 귀하는 MTA 에 불만을 제기할 수 있는 권리와 더불어 Federal Transit Administration, Office of Civil Rights, Attention: Complaint Team, East Building 5th Floor-TCR, 1200 New Jersey Avenue, SE, Washington, DC 20590 에 Title VI 불만을 제기할 권리가 있습니다. 그러나 미국 평등 고용 기회 위원회(EOC), 뉴욕주 인권국(NYSDHR) 등과 같은 법원이나 행정기관 또는 기타 외부 포럼에 불만을 제기하는 경우, MTA 는 귀하의 사건을 행정상으로 종결하고 이 사건을 기관의 법무부서로 회부하여 처리할 것입니다.
[p134_c0018] 본인은 여기에 포함된 정보가 본인의 지식, 정보 및 신념에 부합하며 사실임을 확인합니다.

This survey is available in: English, Español, 简体中文, 日本語, বাংলা, 한국어, Português, and Italiano. https://new.mta.info/mta/mta-english-complaint-form/SV_3UHtJEXWxt4PdNI?link=2

### [p137_c0008] Avviso di non discriminazione al pubblico
[p137_c0009] Updated Apr 26, 2024
[p137_c0010] Per richiedere servizi di assistenza linguistica gratuiti, puoi contattare il 511.
### [p137_c0011] Denunce di discriminazione relative al Titolo VI e correlati
[p137_c0012] La Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA) e le sue agenzie affiliate e sussidiarie si impegnano a garantire che nessuno sia escluso dalla partecipazione, che a nessuno vengano negati i benefici o che nessuno sia soggetto a discriminazioni nei nostri programmi, servizi o attività sulla base di etnia, colore o provenienza (inclusa una conoscenza limitata della lingua inglese) come tutelato dal titolo VI del Civil Rights Act del 1964, ed età, sesso, disabilità o religione come previsto dal Federal Transit Laws, (49 U.S.C. § 5332). Per presentare una denuncia scritta o per richiedere ulteriori informazioni sulla politica di non discriminazione del Titolo VI e correlati della MTA, gli individui possono contattare una specifica Divisione per la Diversità e l'Uguaglianza di Opportunità della MTA cliccando qui (/transparency/title-vi/filing-a-complaint), oppure per il modulo di denuncia clicca qui ( https://new.mta.info/document/105576 ).
[p137_c0013] MTA Headquarters Department of Diversity and Civil Rights 2 Broadway, 16th Floor New York, NY 10004 (800) 466-8577
### [p137_c0014] Presentazione di una denuncia al Dipartimento dei trasporti degli Stati Uniti
[p137_c0015] Gli individui possono anche presentare una denuncia direttamente a:
[p137_c0016] U.S. Department of Transportation Federal Transit Administration Office of Civil Rights Complaint Team East Building, 5th Floor—TCR 1200 New Jersey Ave. SE Washington, DC 20590
### [p137_c0017] THE MTA ()
[p137_c0018] About the MTA (/about) Contact Us (/contact-us) Careers (/careers)
[p137_c0019] _Master Page # 137 of 1629 - Diversity Committee Meeting 3/23/2026_

## Page 138

### [p138_c0001] Titolo VI e relative leggi sulla non discriminazione Modulo di gestione dei reclami
[p138_c0002] MTA e le sue agenzie consociate e affiliate sono impegnate a fornire un servizio esente da discriminazioni per garantire che nessuna persona sia soggetta a esclusione dalla partecipazione, diniego dei benefici o discriminazione nel ricevimento di qualsiasi programma o attività finanziati a livello federale della MTA, compresi i servizi e altri programmi legati al trasporto collettivo sulla base di criteri di razza, colore, origine nazionale (compreso l'accesso in base alla limitata conoscenza della lingua inglese (LEP - limited English proficiency), età, sesso, religione e/o disabilità.
[p138_c0003] Chi ritiene di aver subito discriminazioni è pregato di fornire le informazioni necessarie riportate di seguito, per poter agevolare l'elaborazione del suo reclamo. Se per compilare il presente modulo occorre assistenza, consultare l'ultima pagina per trovare numeri di telefono di contatto e indirizzi postali relativi a tale assistenza.
[p138_c0004] Il reclamo deve essere presentato entro 180 giorni dalla discriminazione denunciata. La mancata presentazione del reclamo entro 180 giorni determinerà il rigetto del reclamo. Fanno eccezione le accuse di molestie sessuali, che possono essere presentate fino a tre anni dall'episodio denunciato, in conformità alla legislazione dello Stato di New York.
[p138_c0005] Selezionare l'agenzia MTA a cui si intende presentare il presente reclamo: Autobus MTA Costruzione e sviluppo
[p138_c0006] MTA Sede centrale MTA Long Island Rail Road Metro-North Railroad New York City Transit
### [p138_c0007] Official Use Only (Riservato al funzionario)
[p138_c0008] Complaint No: _____ Investigator(s) Name: _____
### [p138_c0009] 1. Denunciante:
[p138_c0010] (Il denunciante è la persona o il gruppo di persone che presentano l'accusa di discriminazione)
[p138_c0011] Nome del denunciante: _____
[p138_c0012] Indirizzo: _____
[p138_c0013] Località: _____ Stato: _____ Codice postale: _____
[p138_c0014] N. telefono (Primario): _____ (Secondario): _____
[p138_c0015] E-mail: _____
[p138_c0016] Lei sta presentando questo reclamo a suo proprio nome?:
[p138_c0017] Si
[p138_c0018] No
[p138_c0019] Se sì, vai al punto 3.
### [p138_c0020] 2. Nome della persona che ha subito la discriminazione o il trattamento non giusto oggetto dell'accusa: (Se diverso dal denunciante.)
[p138_c0021] Nome: _____
[p138_c0022] Indirizzo: _____
[p138_c0023] Località: _____ Stato: _____ Codice postale: _____
[p138_c0024] N. telefono (Primario): _____ (Secondario) _____ E-mail: _____
### [p138_c0025] 3. Informazioni relative al reclamo:
[p138_c0026] Su quale fondamento si base il suo reclamo di discriminazione? (Selezionare tutte le opzioni applicabili.)
[p138_c0027] Razza Colore Origine nazionale Età Sesso Religione Disabilità Altro _____
[p138_c0028] Data dell'episodio (mese, giorno, anno): _____ Ora dell'episodio: _____
[p138_c0029] Tragitto autobus/Numero autobus, Linea ferroviaria/Numero vagone treno, oppure Stazione metropolitana: _____

(Se occorre più spazio, allegare altri fogli o utilizzare il retro del presente modulo.) _____

### [p139_c0006] 4. Cronologia reclami (se Lei ha presentato questo reclamo a un'altra agenzia o ha presentato reclami precedenti.)
[p139_c0007] Lei ha presentato un reclamo per questa presunta discriminazione presso un'altra agenzia federale, statale o locale, oppure presso un tribunale federale o statale? (Selezionare lo spazio opportuno) Si No
[p139_c0008] Se ha risposto Si, controlli l'agenzia interessata.
- [p139_c0009] Agenzia federale Tribunale federale Agenzia statale Tribunale statale Agenzia locale o cittadina Altro
[p139_c0010] Fornisci le informazioni di contatto dell'agenzia a cui hai anche presentato il reclamo: _____
